name: Control Ultimate Edition
synopsis: A third-person action game set in the brutalist Federal Bureau of Control, where Jesse Faden wields telekinetic powers and a shape-shifting service weapon to battle a paranormal invasion called the Hiss. Remedy Entertainment crafts a deeply strange Metroidvania-style world of shifting architecture and government conspiracies inspired by the SCP Foundation. The Ultimate Edition includes both major DLC expansions.

name: L.A. Noire
synopsis: Set in 1947 Los Angeles, Detective Cole Phelps rises through the LAPD solving murders, arson and vice cases using the revolutionary MotionScan facial animation technology to detect suspects' lies. The game reconstructs post-war LA in stunning period detail with a jazz-noir soundtrack and a narrative inspired by James Ellroy. Its interrogation system remains one of gaming's most original mechanics.

name: Ryse: Son of Rome
synopsis: Crytek's launch title for Xbox One follows Roman centurion Marius Titus on a campaign of vengeance from the Roman legions in Britain to the Colosseum of Rome, featuring melee combat built around execution chains. Visually it was extraordinary for 2013 and one of the best-looking launch titles in console history. Its single-player campaign tells a moving father-son story set against spectacular Roman spectacle.

name: God of War: Ragnarök
synopsis: Kratos and Atreus journey across the Nine Realms as Fimbulwinter descends and Ragnarök draws near, forcing them to confront gods, giants and their own complicated relationship. Santa Monica Studio expanded every system from the 2018 game with more weapons, bigger worlds and more complex combat, while delivering a narrative that rivals prestige television. It won multiple Game of the Year awards.

name: Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered
synopsis: Insomniac Games' spectacular PS5 remaster of their 2018 Spider-Man game features rebuilt character models, ray-traced reflections, SSD-powered instant loading and DualSense haptic feedback across the full game and all three DLC chapters. Peter Parker juggles life, relationships and his superhero duties while hunting the Sinister Six through a stunning recreation of New York City. It remains the gold standard of superhero video games.

name: Days Gone
synopsis: Set two years after a global pandemic in the Oregon wilderness, biker Deacon St. John rides his Drifter motorbike through a survival open world hunting Freakers — feral infected humans who swarm in massive hordes of hundreds. Bend Studio's technical achievement with the Horde AI systems creates genuinely terrifying encounters. Though critically divisive at launch, its player community passionately defended it and found a large audience.

name: Devil May Cry 5
synopsis: Capcom's stylish action franchise returns with three playable characters — the cocky Nero with a mechanical Devil Breaker arm, the enigmatic V who summons demons to fight, and returning legend Dante — battling a demonic invasion of Red Grave City. Its combo system is the deepest and most expressive in the genre, rewarding mastery with eye-melting visual spectacle. The RE Engine's photorealistic character rendering was unprecedented for the genre.

name: Ghost of Tsushima
synopsis: Sucker Punch's stunning samurai open world follows Jin Sakai on Tsushima Island during the 1274 Mongol invasion, torn between the honourable code of the samurai and the ruthlessly effective tactics of the Ghost. The game's fluid katana combat, painterly art direction and wind-guided exploration created one of the most atmospherically beautiful open worlds on PS4. Its online Legends mode added co-op mythology-themed missions.

name: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
synopsis: Respawn Entertainment's third-person action game follows Cal Kestis, a Padawan who survived Order 66, rebuilding his connection to the Force across alien worlds to restore the Jedi Order. Its Souls-inspired combat, Metroidvania world structure and Uncharted-style set-pieces created the definitive Star Wars single-player game of the modern era. It sold over 20 million copies.

name: Batman: Arkham Asylum GOTY Edition
synopsis: The game that proved superhero games could be extraordinary, trapping Batman in Arkham Asylum as the Joker takes over. Its Freeflow combat system, predator stealth sequences and Metroidvania exploration of the island were all genre-defining. Mark Hamill's Joker performance remains the definitive voice acting in a superhero game. A landmark moment for the medium.

name: Batman: Arkham City GOTY
synopsis: Widely considered the greatest superhero game ever made, Arkham City opens Gotham's slums as a prison mega-complex and delivers Batman's most epic adventure. Multiple villain storylines interweave across a brilliantly realised city, with a twist ending that genuinely shocked even comics veterans. The Catwoman DLC, Robin and Nightwing challenge maps made this the complete Batman experience.

name: Batman: Arkham Knight
synopsis: Rocksteady's conclusion to their Arkham trilogy introduces the Batmobile as a driveable tank across a fully realised Gotham City. The Arkham Knight's identity is a divisive but emotionally charged reveal. Despite the notorious PC port, the console versions delivered an emotionally resonant finale to one of gaming's greatest trilogies with spectacular Batman gameplay.

name: Batman: Arkham Origins
synopsis: A prequel to the Arkham series set during Batman's second year as a vigilante on Christmas Eve as eight assassins hunt him across Gotham City. Despite a weaker critical reception than Rocksteady's entries, its Black Mask/Joker story is genuinely compelling and Roger Craig Smith's Batman performance is excellent. The Deathstroke boss fight is the series' finest.

name: Call to Arms - Gates of Hell: Ostfront
Clone Drone in the Danger Zone
Idle Champions of the Forgotten Realms
Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones
Quantum Break
synopsis: Remedy's ambitious blend of time-stop action gameplay and live-action TV drama interwoven between chapters, following protagonist Jack Joyce who gains time manipulation powers during a catastrophic experiment. Each player choice affects the parallel live-action episodes. Its visual style is exceptional and its story surprisingly moving despite the awkward format.

name: Rise of the Tomb Raider
synopsis: Lara Croft pursues the secret of immortality to Siberia and Syria against the fanatical Trinity organisation in Crystal Dynamics' finest Tomb Raider entry. Its crafting, bow-centric combat, and gorgeous environments represent the series at its best. The season pass content, particularly Blood Ties and Baba Yaga, expanded the experience substantially.

name: Ghostwire: Tokyo
synopsis: Virtually all of Tokyo's population has vanished and supernatural Visitors stalk the rain-slicked streets. Akito Inui — partially possessed by a spirit hunter called KK — explores a meticulously recreated Tokyo using weaving spells called Ethereal Weaving to exorcise these spectres. Its folklore-rich world and unique combat make it one of the most distinctive games on PS5.

name: God of War Ragnarok
synopsis: Kratos and Atreus journey across the Nine Realms as Fimbulwinter descends and Ragnarök draws near. Santa Monica expanded every system from 2018 with more weapons, bigger worlds and more complex combat while delivering a narrative that rivals prestige television. Freya's arc, the Atreus chapters and Brok's story are among the most emotionally resonant in any game.

name: LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga
Marvel's Spider-Man 2
synopsis: Both Peter Parker and Miles Morales share the screen as protagonists across a massive expanded New York City adding Queens and Brooklyn, facing Kraven the Hunter and the symbiote invasion that brings Venom into a devastating personal conflict with Peter. Its web-swing traversal system, switching between heroes and spectacular set-pieces make it the definitive superhero game experience.

name: Tunic
synopsis: A tiny fox in a mysterious land must uncover the secrets of an ancient civilisation guided only by pages of an in-game instruction manual written in an alien language that players must themselves decipher. Its Zelda-inspired exploration, tough combat and meta-puzzle design create one of the most clever and rewarding adventure games ever made.

name: Adventure Time: Pirates of the Enchiridion
Batman: Return to Arkham - Arkham Asylum
Batman: Return to Arkham - Arkham City
Earth Defense Force 4.1: The Shadow of New Despair
ENDER LILIES: Quietus of the Knights
Five Nights at Freddy's: Security Breach
God of War
synopsis: A reinvention of the God of War franchise following an older Kratos who has settled in Norse mythology with his young son Atreus. Their journey to scatter his late wife's ashes from the highest peak is a meditation on fatherhood, grief and breaking cycles of violence. The seamless single-shot camera technique and deeply emotional story won multiple Game of the Year awards.

name: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy
synopsis: Players control Peter Quill commanding the team through decision-based narrative while managing their big mouths and bigger egos across an imaginative space adventure. Its inspired 80s soundtrack, genuinely funny writing and surprisingly deep Quill-as-leader mechanics make it one of the finest Marvel adaptations. Often overshadowed by Avengers' failure but completely superior in every way.

name: Marvel's Spider-Man
synopsis: Insomniac's spectacular take on an experienced Peter Parker balancing life, relationships and heroism across a stunning recreation of Manhattan. The web-swing traversal system remains the finest in any open world game, and its story delivers both authentic superhero spectacle and genuine emotional stakes. The Mister Negative arc and silver lining DLC are particular highlights.

name: Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor - Game of the Year Edition
Overcooked! All You Can Eat
synopsis: A collection of the first two Overcooked games plus all DLC in one package, featuring frantic cooking cooperation across increasingly absurd kitchen environments — medieval castles, moving trucks, haunted houses. Its accessibility and friendship-destroying difficulty make it the definitive couch co-op party game experience. The new accessibility features in All You Can Eat greatly expanded its audience.

name: Paw Patrol: Mighty Pups Save Adventure Bay!
Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville
SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle For Bikini Bottom - Rehydrated
Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep: A Wonderlands One-shot Adventure
Tomb Raider I-III Remastered Starring Lara Croft
